title: 15X Magnifying Makeup Mirror for Desk Double Sided 1X/15X Desk Mirror,Portable Table Small Standing Magnifying for Cosmetic
features: 💎【Timeless Classic Design】Travel magnifying mirror with elegant design and wide-angle view.It looks like a pair of crystal shoes.Instantly elevates any bathroom or bedrooms’decor style.This classic design which means your mirror will never go out of style!

🔎【1X/15X HD Magnification Double Sided Mirror】This is high definition makeup mirror with no distortion.Using 1X mirror reflects your overall makeup,the 15X magnificartion mirror to achieve exquisite makeup,such as eyeliner,eyelashes,etc.
👍【360 Degree Rotation Desk Mirror】The makeup mirror for desk can be rotated 360 degrees.You can adjust the mirror to any angle as you need and switch between 1X and 15X sides freely.

😍【Sturdy and Durable Makeup Mirror】Made of PS+ HD mirror.This travel mirror has a high-quality acrylic body.Sturdy base provides smooth swing,effortless adjustability.The acrylic material with rust-proof,moisture-proof and scratch-resistant.BUT bamboo base easy to get mouldy.

💗【Perfect Traval Companion】Size is 6.8"x6.7".Place on your vanity at home,or pack along with your luggage for travel.Its portability and space-saving design make it the perfect travel companion, whether you're heading out on a vacation, holiday, or business trip.

🎁【Best Gift】If you are looking for a perfect gift for your girlfriend,sister,or mom for festival.This makeup mirror is a great idea. Any Issues with the makeup mirror,please contact us via Amazon! We will be response you within 24 hours
